title: Aurora Cannabis Inc. Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Aurora Cannabis Inc. reported Q3 results beating both earnings and revenue consensus estimates. Key highlights from quarterly performance showing strong execution across medical cannabis segment. Company's medical cannabis revenue growth continued at double-digit pace with international operations showing particularly strong momentum. Adjusted EBITDA generation remained robust, demonstrating company's focus on profitable growth rather than volume for volume's sake. Revenue beat consensus estimates driven by stronger than expected international medical cannabis sales across key markets including Germany, Australia, Poland and UK. Strong quarter reflects company's successful pivot to high-margin medical cannabis markets and disciplined operational execution. Balance sheet remained strong with substantial cash position and debt-free cannabis operations. Management's ability to exceed analyst expectations across multiple metrics demonstrates market confidence in business strategy and execution capabilities.
